# Serialized Transaction Size Evidence

This artifact records direct wire.MsgTx serialization measurements used by eval_report.

Formula: vbytes = ceil(weight / 4), weight = base*3 + total, witness = total - base.

| name | base_bytes | witness_bytes | total_bytes | weight | vbytes | inputs | outputs | witness_items | tx_hex_len |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| tx_commit_A (no HTLC) | 227 | 224 | 451 | 1132 | 283 | 1 | 3 | 4 | 902 |
| tx_commit_A (HTLC+linked ACS) | 225 | 224 | 449 | 1124 | 281 | 1 | 3 | 4 | 898 |
